== Notes for [[Item:Q105547|Q105547]] ==

Traditionally, '''22 generations''' from [http://www.geni.com/people/Rabbi-Yochanan-Hassandlar-%D7%A8%D7%91%D7%99-%D7%99%D7%95%D7%97%D7%A0%D7%9F-%D7%94%D7%A1%D7%A0%D7%93%D7%9C%D7%A8/6000000002789053127 '''Yochanan HaSandlar רבי יוחנן הסנדלר'''] to [http://www.geni.com/people/Yehoshua-Zimri-%D7%99%D7%94%D7%95%D7%A9%D7%A2-%D7%96%D7%9E%D7%A8%D7%99-earliest-recorded-ancestor-of-RASHI/6000000002788823751 '''Yehoshua Zimri'''], earliest recorded ancestor of Rashi or according to another tradition '''33 generations''' between '''Yochanan HaSandlar''' and '''Rashi'''.

To bridge the gap of ca 800 years between [https://www.geni.com/people/Rabbi-Yochanan-HaSandlar/6000000002789053127?through=6000000018917908893 '''Rabbi Yochanan haSandlar'''] (b. ca 100 ''CE'') to [https://www.geni.com/people/Yehoshua-Zimri-earliest-recorded-ancestor-of-RASHI/6000000002788823751?through=6000000025587597349 '''Yehoshua Zimri'''] (b. ca before 895 ''CE'') - a gap of ca 22 generations seems much too small.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018917908893

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
